Global Planning Model
CGPM-591 (Epic)
CGPM-665 - As A User, I WANT to be able to be able to manage the core link capacity requirements on one page when running a core scenario
CGPM-688 - As A User, I WANT to be able to be able to manage the core card type, exclude card and inventory pages on one page when running a core scenario
CGPM-701 - As a DEVELOPER, I WANT to integrate the new core pages into the GPM model
CGPM-721 - Fix column name issue
CGPM-723 - Fix frontend issues - link connection
CGPM-748 - As a DEVELOPER, I WANT to remove all instances of exclude card, new card, inventory, new router link, upgrade threshold and max link pages from the API and WebUI codebases.
CGPM-756 - As a DEVELOPER I WANT to ensure that the scenario output with the new card and link pages is IDENTICAL to the scenario output with the original six pages
CGPM-229 (Epic)
CGPM-637 - AS A User I WANT the Outputs not to say Spectrum Upgrades if the USA is already at the correct build SO THAT we reduce the confusion on the Upgrades Tab
CGPM-617 (Epic)
CGPM-699 - AS A Developer I want to complete the Testing and Support for HFC Migration
CGPM-693 - Validate the logic for incrementing the BNG's - To many are being created
CGPM-692 - AS A User I Want to see the New BNG's be added on the Summary Tab both Incrementally and Totals
CGPM-691 - AS A User I Want to see the New OLT's be added on the Summary Tab both Incrementally and Totals
CGPM-694 - As a GPM developer, I want to refactor the XGS-PON Summary Output page code So that it becomes more maintainable, efficient, and aligned with best practices.
CGPM-812 (Epic)
CGPM-684 (Epic)
CGPM-706 - As A User I WANT to be able to see the added and Recovered Power per Hardware on both the HFC Summary Tab
CGPM-708 - As A User I WANT to be able to see the man effort Days per Hardware on both the HFC Summary Tab
CGPM-685 - Recovery of the Docsis Equipment in line with the HFC Migrations to XGS-PON Logic
CGPM-709 - As A User I WANT to be able to see the man effort Days per Hardware on both the XGS-PON Summary Tab
CGPM-707 - As A User I WANT to be able to see the added and Recovered Power per Hardware on both the XGS-PON Summary Tab
CGPM-720 - As A Developer I WANT to extend the resource cost summary outputs to include existing upgrades
CGPM-613 - B2B OLT Port AIR
CGPM-647 - AS A Developer I want to Load the new data into the new Splitter Objects SO THTA we can do the calculations
CGPM-649 - AS A User I WANT the GPM to Output the Month on Month Update to the CIR/AIR at an OLT port Level to Excel SO THAT B2B can use the Data.
CGPM-655 - AS A Tester I WANT to Test the Outputs for the Monthly AIR-CIR OLT Port Growth Logic
CGPM-685 (Epic)
CGPM-598 (Epic)
CGPM-698 - AS A Developer I want to complete the Testing for 50% Logic for FibreUP
CGPM-625 (Epic)
CGPM-670 - AS A User I WANT To be able to Select the OLT Port CIR/AIR Growth Output to Excel from the Outputs Page
CGPM-624 - As A User I WANT to be able to Enabled/Disable the CIR and AIR OLT Port Management from the Upgrades page
CGPM-669 - AS A User I WANT to be able Manage the CAPEX and OPEX for the New Upgrades on the Budget Management Page
CGPM-743 - As A Developer I want to extend Upgrade Options to Allow the User to provide values for Bandwidth And Utilisation of Traffic and AIR CIR
CGPM-724 (Epic)
CGPM-727 - As A User I WANT to be Able to Add, Edit and Delete a New Inventory List Admin Screen SO THAT we can define the Network Element being added
CGPM-729 - As A User I WANT to be Able to Add, Edit and Delete a List of OLT PON Ports SO THAT we can select them when adding Network
CGPM-732 - AS A User I WANT the Scenario Settings Page to be grouped SO THAT it is easy to navigate to the Correct Network Setting
CGPM-734 - AS A System Owner I WANT a new admin screen to manage the New Network Settings configuration So THAT it is easy to update the rules.
CGPM-733 - AS A User I WANT to have a new New Network Page on the Scenario Settings Screen SO THAT we can add new network to the scenario and see the impact of that new network
CGPM-770 - As A User I WANT to add a New BNG to the Core Sites and be able to Map and existing OLT's to the BNG SO THAT We can See Impact of re-mapping and OLT
CGPM-778 - As A User I WANT to be able to Map OLT's from an Existing CMTS Site to the BNG SO THAT We can See Impact of re-mapping and OLT
CGPM-781 - As A User I WANT to be to Select a L3 Node and Migrate the Traffic and Customers to the Connected OLT So THAT we can prevent Node Splits
CGPM-782 - As A User I WANT to Add New Menu List under User Guide for the Different Types of Guides be created
CGPM-755 (Epic)
CGPM-760 - AS A Developer I WANT to Research the network visualisation software options within GCP in line with the strategic roadmap SO THAT we can create a MVP based on a CIN network Sample

CGPM-806 - Need to Update the Costing HFC Summary Table to include the adding of D3.1 Spectrum
CGPM-805 - Update the Service Upgrade Logic to cater for more then one D3.1 Upgrade in the same quarter
CGPM-725 (Epic)
CGPM-765 - AS A Product Owner I WANT to add the Capability of influencing the Customer Calculations for Consumer Forecasting by introducing the Customer Growth Factor SO THAT we can replicate the Actual Growth of Customers

CGPM-817 - I WANT to Check the CIR & AIR Links Upgrades Logic
CGPM-816 - As A User I WANT to see the AIR & CIR Monthly Growth per OLT on the XGS-PON Traffic outputs
